llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Launched 'Kairos', an operating system for intelligence, delivering measurable impact and productivity gains for clients in healthcare and financial services.
Reported weak Q4FY26 results with net profit up only 4% YoY and VNB declining 8.36% YoY; VNB margin contracted; shares fell 4%; analysts cut estimates.
HDFC Bank to infuse ₹1,000 crore through preferential share issuance, increasing its stake to 50.5% from 50.2%, improving solvency and capital flexibility.
Nomura downgraded to Neutral, reducing target price to ₹725 (from ₹815) and cutting APE/VNB growth estimates due to competition, expecting subdued multiples.
Motilal Oswal maintained Buy, raising target to ₹760, citing visible green shoots, improving agency channel growth, rising protection contribution, and stable VNB margin outlook.
Emkay Global maintained Buy, target ₹750, expecting sustained momentum in retail protection, growth acceleration in credit life, and pickup in non-par savings to support FY27 growth.
JM Financial upgraded to Add, raising target to ₹670 (from ₹644), viewing current valuation as 'mouth watering' and seeing any further weakness as an opportunity to add quality.
Scheduled to announce Q4 FY26 earnings soon.
Anticipation of FY26 dividend payout, with potential to top estimates for the fifth consecutive year.

Stock hit a 52-week high on strong Q4 FY26 results expectations; multiple analysts (Motilal Oswal, Nuvama, Antique, ICICI Securities) predict significant growth in revenue, EBITDA, and PAT. ICICI Securities gave a 'stocks to buy' tag.
Shares jumped over 13% after reporting a significant 66% rise in consolidated net profit for Q4FY26 and strong increase in revenue from operations.
